suspected_locations.reason: Intent classification model/prompt returned 4001 (其他意图) instead of marketing planning intent, causing downstream errors.

attributes.root_cause_hypothesis: The intent recognition stage misclassified the user query as '其他意图' (4001) instead of a marketing planning intent. This incorrect classification led to stage routing to non_agent with immediate termination, skipping field clarification and planning, causing all blocked expectations.

summary.summary_text: The intent recognition stage misclassified the user query as '其他意图' (4001) instead of a marketing planning intent. This incorrect classification led to stage routing to non_agent with immediate termination, skipping field clarification and planning, causing all blocked expectations.
